text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Oh man, it's no good. I can't focus one bit...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I wanna go on a reckless shoppin' spree
'n spend a whole heap of cash without worryin'
about the consequences...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Bet it must be real fun to fill a shoppin' trolley up
to the brim... I'd throw fish cakes in, and pea
sprouts, and bean sprouts...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even in her wildest fantasies, Tamamo Cross only
splurges on cheap groceries. But from the looks
of it, she's fairly exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The non-stop races must be taking their toll on
her. I think it's about time I adjusted her schedule.
